name: TREEMAP

meta.data_required: 4 to 12 additive categories of one total, one optional highlight

alternatives: CH-RNK-01 (when order matters more than area)

use_when: a total split across 4 to 12 parts where the big picture beats precision
budget, scope, or inventory composition at a glance
not_when: precise comparisons (area is read badly; use CH-RNK-01)
hierarchies deeper than one level (out of scope for this entry)
more than 12 cells (aggregate the tail into Other)

data_shape.title: string, action title stating the concentration with a number
data_shape.eyebrow: string caps, rendered only when the DL chrome asks for it
data_shape.unit: string, appears once, on the largest cell's value
data_shape.categories: array of {label, value > 0, highlight?}, 4 to 12 items

scale.note: squarified layout (Bruls), input sorted descending; deterministic for fixed order

rules: one level only; cells sorted descending before layout
labels only in cells >= 90x44 px; small cells stay silent (their story is in the title)
one highlight maximum (role primary); all others role muted
unit once, on the largest cell
anti_patterns: rainbow cells (one hue plus one highlight, always)
qa: labels absent below the size threshold
title states the concentration with a number
